THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUCKLEY, JESSIE S. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 410 ANDOVER STREET SAN FRANCSICO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-15-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. FORGIVES SUM OF $1,550. RENTS AND PER DIEM DAMAGES THROUGH 9/15/98. NO STAYS OR NEW TRIALS OR APPEALS. IF DEFT. VACATES ON OR BEFORE 9/15/98 AND FUFILLS TERMS HEREIN PLTF. TO DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR OTHER TERMS.
